/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/nettycore_config_demo.dir/__/__/tests/lemo/config/nettycore_config_demo.cc.o -o /home/wangmaosen/copy_linux/third/KVStore/bin/LemoNettyCore/config/nettycore_config_demo  libnettycore_config.a libnettycore_log.a libnettycore_server.a libnettycore_socket.a libnettycore_io.a libnettycore_fiber.a libnettycore_memory.a libnettycore_thread.a libnettycore_utils.a -lyaml-cpp
